personal.bio: Hi, I'm Aaditya, a frontend developer and UI/UX designer passionate about creating intuitive, high-performance user experiences. Currently pursuing M.Tech at IIT Jodhpur.
personal.description: Aaditya Gupta is a M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering student at the Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur. A Full-Stack Web Developer with a strong foundation in AI/ML and a passion for Deep Learning, Autonomous Agents, Finalist (Top 2%) in the IndiaAI Impact Buildathon 2026, Volunteer for AWS User Group Kolkata and Campus Ambassador for EDC IIT Delhi.

aboutDescriptionSegments.text: , I focus on building applications that bridge the gap between intelligent algorithms and robust web architectures. Recently, I was recognized as a
Finalist (Top 2%) in the IndiaAI Impact Buildathon 2026
, showcasing my ability to build real-world AI solutions under pressure. Alongside my technical pursuits, I am currently a
Volunteer for AWS User Group Kolkata
, where I utilize my communication and management skills to coordinate tech events and foster developer engagement, and I have served as a top-performing
Campus Ambassador for EDC IIT Delhi
. I thrive in fast-paced hackathons, collaborative team environments, and projects that challenge the boundaries of modern technology.

whatIDo.title: Full-Stack Web Dev
whatIDo.description: React, Node.js, Express — Crafting responsive, performant web applications end-to-end.

whatIDo.title: Machine Learning
whatIDo.description: Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow, Librosa — Building intelligent models for data-driven insights.

whatIDo.title: Cloud & DevOps
whatIDo.description: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes — Designing scalable cloud infrastructure with automation.

highlights: Designed and developed a responsive personal portfolio website to cleanly showcase technical projects and professional achievements.
Built a foundational e-commerce web application, implementing core navigation, product displays, and structured user interfaces.
Progressed through structured beginner to intermediate project levels, achieving targeted development goals within a fast-paced timeline.
Applied self-paced technical learning to solve coding challenges, debug interfaces, and steadily improve web responsiveness and design.
Completed Google’s structured AI/ML Learning Pathway, mastering TensorFlow, image classification, object detection, and product image search via hands-on labs and assessments
Built and trained production-ready image classification models leveraging TensorFlow for optimized accuracy and performance
Implemented robust object detection pipelines and product image search systems using advanced Google ML APIs and development tooling
Engaged in comprehensive technical evaluations and hands-on developer modules to validate and refine machine learning workflows

projects.title: My Portfolio Project
projects.description: Designed and developed a highly interactive, responsive personal portfolio website featuring high-performance animations and smooth visual transitions. Leveraged modern component architecture to ensure seamless cross-device rendering and fast loading times.

projects.title: AI Voice Detection System
projects.description: Built an ML pipeline and a secure, real-time FastAPI to classify audio as AI-generated or human-spoken across 5 languages. Extracted acoustic features from curated data and trained optimal classifiers, returning JSON responses with confidence scores and automated explanations.

projects.title: Medicinal Plant Classification System
projects.description: Engineered an end-to-end computer vision application that utilizes a fine-tuned ConvNeXt classifier to identify medicinal plants from leaf images with high precision.
